name: Stop-Computer
-ComputerName
-CN
-__SERVER
-Server
-IPAddress
options.description: Specifies the computers to stop. The default is the local computer.

options.name: -Credential
options.description: Specifies a user account that has permission to do this action. The default is the current user.

options.name: -Force
options.description: Forces an immediate shut down of the computer.

options.name: -WsmanAuthentication
options.description: Specifies the mechanism that is used to authenticate the user credentials when this cmdlet uses the WSMan protocol. The default value is Default .

name: -Confirm
-cf
options.description: Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

name: -WhatIf
-wi
options.description: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet isn't run.

args.name: -ComputerName
args.description: Specifies the computers to stop. The default is the local computer.

args.name: -Credential
args.description: Specifies a user account that has permission to do this action. The default is the current user.

description: Stops (shuts down) local and remote computers.
